Explanation: After reviewing the search results, none provide evidence of a journal article published between 2010 and 2016 (exclusive) on a supplement-based approach to a disease, authored by more than two people, published by a publishing group launched in 2010, and with two authors later co-authoring a 2016 article (with six others) on the same supplement-based approach and disease. The closest match, PriMera Scientific (launched in 2010), does not list any relevant articles or author overlaps. No article title matching all criteria is found [72312, 41797, 67279, 11440].
Exact Answer: No qualifying article identified in the provided search results.
Confidence: 10%
